narration: Ever wonder why we resist change, even when it’s better?
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wonder why we resist change, even when it’s better?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why we resist change, even when it’s better?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wonder why we resist change, even when it’s better?

narration: This is status quo bias, a tendency to favor the familiar over the unknown.
visual_description: Context visual: This is status quo bias, a tendency to favor the familiar over the unknown.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This is status quo bias, a tendency to favor the familiar over the unknown.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This is status quo bias, a tendency to favor the familiar over the unknown.

narration: Studies show it’s not just laziness; it’s wired in our brains. We feel safer sticking with what we know.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Studies show it’s not just laziness; it’s wired in our brains. We feel safer sticking with what we know.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Studies show it’s not just laziness; it’s wired in our brains. We feel safer sticking with what we know.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Studies show it’s not just laziness; it’s wired in our brains. We feel safer sticking with what we know.

narration: People often pay more for old habits than exploring new options. We fear loss more than we crave gain.
visual_description: Evidence visual: People often pay more for old habits than exploring new options. We fear loss more than we crave gain.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: People often pay more for old habits than exploring new options. We fear loss more than we crave gain.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: People often pay more for old habits than exploring new options. We fear loss more than we crave gain.

narration: Recognizing this bias empowers us to make better choices and embrace change.
